text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! How c-cute! All those tiny bodies huddled
together! I-I can't fight this feeling... I must
protect them!

text_block_list.name: Person Playing Catch
text_block_list.text: Ah?! Oh no! Look out! The ball—

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I suppose I should be grateful that the ball
hit me and not the kittens.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But as a martial artist, it's unacceptable that I left
myself so wide open... Tch, I still have much to
learn!
